description: iCloud Drive 同步方案 — 零账号零服务器本地优先多设备同步，基于 Issue #64 设计文档 tasks/design-icloud-sync.md

userStories.title: VaultLocator 协议 + LocalVaultLocator 默认实现
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to decouple vault path from business logic so the storage backend can be swapped at runtime without touching the 37 call sites.
acceptanceCriteria: Create DayPage/Storage/VaultLocator.swift with protocol VaultLocator { var vaultURL: URL { get }; var isUsingiCloud: Bool { get } }

Implement struct LocalVaultLocator: VaultLocator that returns FileManager.default.urls(for: .documentDirectory, in: .userDomainMask)[0].appendingPathComponent('vault') — identical behavior to current VaultInitializer.vaultURL
Add static var shared: VaultLocator to VaultInitializer, initialized to LocalVaultLocator()
Update VaultInitializer.vaultURL to: if let override = testOverrideURL { return override }; return shared.vaultURL
All 37 existing call sites still compile without any modification
testOverrideURL hook remains internal and functional
xcodebuild -scheme DayPage build passes
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Implemented VaultLocator.swift with protocol + LocalVaultLocator; updated VaultInitializer.shared + vaultURL; build passed.

userStories.title: iCloud Entitlements 配置 + iCloudVaultLocator 实现
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the iCloud Drive container wired up so the app can resolve the Ubiquity Container URL and store vault files there.
acceptanceCriteria: Add to DayPage.entitlements: com.apple.developer.icloud-container-identifiers = [iCloud.com.daypage.app], com.apple.developer.ubiquity-container-identifiers = [iCloud.$(TeamIdentifierPrefix)com.daypage.app], com.apple.developer.icloud-services = [CloudDocuments]
Create struct iCloudVaultLocator: VaultLocator in VaultLocator.swift with containerID = 'iCloud.com.daypage.app'
iCloudVaultLocator.vaultURL returns FileManager.default.url(forUbiquityContainerIdentifier: containerID)?.appendingPathComponent('Documents/vault') — returns nil when iCloud unavailable
iCloudVaultLocator.isUsingiCloud returns true iff url(forUbiquityContainerIdentifier:) is non-nil
Update VaultInitializer.shared lazy init: try iCloudVaultLocator first; if isUsingiCloud → use it, else fallback to LocalVaultLocator()
When iCloud unavailable (Simulator without iCloud account), App launches normally using LocalVaultLocator — no crash
Wrap RawStorage.atomicWrite with NSFileCoordinator.coordinate(writingItemAt:options:.forReplacing) — existing temp-file + replaceItemAt logic stays inside the coordinator block
xcodebuild -scheme DayPage build passes
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: AppSettings: vaultLocation + attachmentPolicy 持久化
userStories.description: As a developer, I need UserDefaults-backed settings for vault location and attachment policy so other services and UI can read current sync state.
acceptanceCriteria: Add enum VaultLocation: String { case local = 'local'; case iCloud = 'iCloud' } to AppSettings.swift
Add enum AttachmentPolicy: String { case onDemand = 'onDemand'; case alwaysLocal = 'alwaysLocal' } to AppSettings.swift
Add AppSettings.vaultLocation: VaultLocation (UserDefaults key 'vaultLocation', default .local)
Add AppSettings.attachmentPolicy: AttachmentPolicy (UserDefaults key 'attachmentPolicy', default .onDemand)
Add AppSettings.migrationCompletedAt: Date? (UserDefaults key 'migrationCompletedAt', default nil)
All properties are @Published and trigger SwiftUI updates
xcodebuild -scheme DayPage build passes
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: iCloudSyncMonitor — NSMetadataQuery 实时监听同步状态
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a service that watches iCloud sync state so the Settings UI can display live upload/download counts.
acceptanceCriteria: Create DayPage/Services/iCloudSyncMonitor.swift as @MainActor final class iCloudSyncMonitor: ObservableObject
@Published var status: SyncStatus with enum SyncStatus { case notConfigured, connected(lastSync: Date?), syncing(pendingFiles: Int), error(message: String) }
@Published var pendingUploadCount: Int = 0
@Published var pendingDownloadCount: Int = 0
func startMonitoring(vaultURL: URL) starts NSMetadataQuery with searchScopes=[NSMetadataQueryUbiquitousDocumentsScope] and predicate filtering by vaultURL.path prefix
NSMetadataQueryDidUpdate handler reads NSMetadataUbiquitousItemIsUploadingKey + IsDownloadingKey per item, updates published counts
When iCloud not configured (LocalVaultLocator active), status = .notConfigured and monitoring is no-op
Register iCloudSyncMonitor.shared as singleton and start monitoring in DayPageApp after VaultInitializer.initializeIfNeeded()
xcodebuild -scheme DayPage build passes
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: ConflictMerger — Raw Memo 冲突合并逻辑 + Swift Testing 单测
userStories.description: As a developer, I need conflict resolution logic for iCloud conflict copies so no memo is ever lost when two devices write to the same day file simultaneously.
acceptanceCriteria: Create DayPage/Services/ConflictMerger.swift with func mergeRawMemos(original: [Memo], conflict: [Memo]) -> [Memo]
Merge algorithm: concatenate both arrays, sort by memo.created ascending, deduplicate by memo.id (UUID), keep first occurrence of each UUID
Create func mergeLogLines(original: String, conflict: String) -> String that deduplicates wiki/log.md lines by timestamp prefix
Create func mergeJSONEntries(original: Data, conflict: Data, idKey: String) -> Data that deduplicates JSON array entries by idKey field (for drafts/*.json)
Detect iCloud conflict copies in vault/raw/ via NSMetadataQuery (NSMetadataUbiquitousItemHasUnresolvedConflictsKey) and auto-merge them using ConflictMerger
After successful merge, delete conflict copy files and write merged result back to primary file using NSFileCoordinator
Post NotificationCenter notification .vaultConflictResolved with ConflictResolutionInfo(date: Date, mergedMemoCount: Int, sourceDevice: String) after merge

Swift Testing unit tests in DayPageTests covering: UUID deduplication keeps unique memos, duplicate UUID keeps only one, merged result is sorted by created, empty array merge, two non-overlapping sets produce union
Tests pass (xcodebuild -scheme DayPage test)
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Settings iCloud 同步面板 + 首次开启引导卡片
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see iCloud sync status in Settings and get guided to enable iCloud Drive if it's not configured.
acceptanceCriteria: Add 'iCloud 同步' section to SettingsView in the Data area, using @StateObject iCloudSyncMonitor.shared
When status == .notConfigured: show a card with '☁️ 开启多设备同步' title, subtitle '在 iPhone 与 iPad 之间同步你的日记', and a '前往 iOS 设置开启 iCloud Drive' button that opens UIApplication.openSettingsURLString
When status == .connected: show green dot + '已连接' + 'iCloud Drive' label + last sync time formatted as '今天 HH:mm' for today or 'M月d日 HH:mm' for other dates
When status == .syncing(let n): show spinner + '同步中' + '\(n) 个文件待传'
When status == .error(let msg): show red exclamation + '同步错误' + msg
Add AttachmentPolicy picker under the status row: '按需下载（节省空间）' and '始终保留本地副本'
When AppSettings.migrationCompletedAt != nil AND Date().timeIntervalSince(migrationCompletedAt) < 30*24*3600: show '切换回本地存储' secondary button
xcodebuild -scheme DayPage build passes
Typecheck passes
Verify in Simulator using verify-daypage skill

userStories.title: 附件按需下载占位符 — MemoCardView iCloud eviction 处理
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see a placeholder when an attachment hasn't been downloaded from iCloud yet, and have it download automatically when I need it.
acceptanceCriteria: In MemoCardView, add func isAttachmentDownloaded(_ url: URL) -> Bool that reads .ubiquitousItemDownloadingStatusKey from URL resource values; returns true for local files (non-ubiquitous)
Add func startDownload(_ url: URL) that calls FileManager.default.startDownloadingUbiquitousItem(at:) — no-op on local files

For photo attachments: if !isAttachmentDownloaded, show a gray RoundedRectangle placeholder with ProgressView centered; call startDownload on appear; when status becomes .current, refresh the thumbnail
For audio attachments: if !isAttachmentDownloaded, show a waveform placeholder with download icon; call startDownload on tap
For local vault (iCloud disabled), isAttachmentDownloaded always returns true — no placeholders shown
When AppSettings.attachmentPolicy == .alwaysLocal, call startDownloadingUbiquitousItem on all vault/raw/assets/ files during VaultInitializer.initializeIfNeeded()
xcodebuild -scheme DayPage build passes
Typecheck passes
Verify in Simulator using verify-daypage skill

userStories.title: VaultMigrationService — 老用户本地 vault → iCloud 迁移 + 回滚
userStories.description: As an existing user with local vault data, I want my data automatically migrated to iCloud when I enable it, with a 30-day rollback window if something goes wrong.
acceptanceCriteria: Create DayPage/Services/VaultMigrationService.swift as @MainActor final class

func migrateToiCloud(localVault: URL, iCloudVault: URL, progress: @escaping (Int, Int) -> Void) async throws — copies all files preserving directory structure and modificationDate, reports (copiedCount, totalCount)

Verification step: compare file count in localVault vs iCloudVault; SHA-256 hash the 3 largest raw/*.md files and 3 latest wiki/daily/*.md files in both locations — throw MigrationError.verificationFailed if any hash mismatches
On verification success: set AppSettings.vaultLocation = .iCloud, AppSettings.migrationCompletedAt = Date()
On verification failure: leave AppSettings.vaultLocation = .local, do not delete local vault
Write a migration.log file to iCloudVault listing each copied file with status (success/failed) and file size
Call migrateToiCloud in VaultInitializer when iCloud becomes available AND AppSettings.vaultLocation == .local AND local vault directory is non-empty
Show migration progress sheet in TodayView or as a system alert during migration (progress callback drives a @Published migrationProgress on a shared migration service)
Settings rollback button (US-006, 30-day window): sets AppSettings.vaultLocation = .local and reinitializes VaultInitializer.shared = LocalVaultLocator()
Swift Testing unit test: mock FileManager verifies that migrationCompletedAt is NOT set when verification fails
Tests pass (xcodebuild -scheme DayPage test)
Typecheck passes
